title: Manufacturing Engineer - Patanjali Ayurved - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Patanjali Ayurved - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
